emails.subject: FW: PG&E settlement offer
emails.body: FW: PG&E settlement offer Ken Lay called Rick Buy and I up to his office talk about settlement just now. He would like to settle for liquidity/good news. Rick Buy is going to discuss with Whalley. To: Buy, Rick

emails.subject: RE: PG&E settlement offer
emails.body: Big week coming up. Bank meeting on Monday in New York and 10-Q on Monday. Can't wait to read it.

emails.subject: RE: PG&E settlement offer
emails.body: RE: PG&E settlement offer when you intend to make counter to PG&E? 10Q out yet? To: Dasovich, Jeff; Steffes, James D.; Mellencamp, Lisa; Curry, Wanda

emails.subject: RE: PG&E settlement offer
emails.body: talking to Lavo at 4pm CST. 10-Q not out yet on EDGAR. To: Tribolet, Michael
